headline: 4 Reasons to Add VICI Properties Stock to Your Portfolio Now
summary: VICI's mission-critical assets, long-term leases, inflation-linked rents and investment-grade balance sheet support durable cash flows and dividend growth.

headline: VICI Properties: Investment-Grade 6.8% Yield At A 5-Year Low
summary: VICI Properties trades at a 5-year low despite robust AFFO growth, dividend yield, and dividend CAGR over the last 8 years. Read why VICI stock is a strong buy.
